languages.text: "Отряды зарковских беглецов вовремя сумели их заметить, так что поселения оказались предупреждены заранее, храни их {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "Отряды зарковских беглецов вовремя сумели их заметить, так что поселения оказались предупреждены заранее, храни их {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g}".

languages.text: "Zarkov's squads of runners managed to spot them in time, so the settlements were given warning, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} save them all."
languages.original_text: "Отряды зарковских беглецов вовремя сумели их заметить, так что поселения оказались предупреждены заранее, храни их {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "Zarkov's squads of runners managed to spot them in time, so the settlements were given warning, God-Emperor save them all."
"Zarkov's squads of runners managed to spot them in time, so the settlements were given warning, God-Emperor save them all."
"Zarkov's squads of runners managed to spot them in time, so the settlements were given warning, God-Emperor save them all."

languages.text: 「ザルコフのランナー部隊が間に合って発見したおかげで、コロニーは警告を受け、{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇帝{/g}が彼らを救ってくれるだろう」
languages.original_text: "Zarkov's squads of runners managed to spot them in time, so the settlements were given warning, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} save them all."

traits.locale_text: ザルコフのランナー部隊が間に合って発見したおかげで、コロニーは警告を受け、神皇帝が彼らを救ってくれるだろう。
「ザルコフのランナー部隊が間に合って発見したおかげで、コロニーは警告を受け、{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇帝{/g}が彼らを救ってくれるだろう」

languages.text: «Los escuadrones de corredores de Zarkov los avistaron a tiempo, así que los asentamientos están sobre aviso. Que el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g} los ampare».
languages.original_text: "Zarkov's squads of runners managed to spot them in time, so the settlements were given warning, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} save them all."

traits.locale_text: «Los escuadrones de corredores de Zarkov los avistaron a tiempo, así que los asentamientos están sobre aviso. Que el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g} los ampare».

languages.text: “{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}庇佑，扎尔科夫的奔行者小队及时发现，并做出了预警，各定居点得以提前准备。”
languages.original_text: "Zarkov's squads of runners managed to spot them in time, so the settlements were given warning, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} save them all."

traits.locale_text: “{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}庇佑，扎尔科夫的奔行者小队及时发现，并做出了预警，各定居点得以提前准备。”

languages.text: "Zarkovs Läufereinheiten haben sie rechtzeitig entdeckt und konnten die Siedlungen warnen. Der {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} stehe ihnen allen bei."
languages.original_text: "Zarkov's squads of runners managed to spot them in time, so the settlements were given warning, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} save them all."

traits.locale_text: "Zarkovs Läufereinheiten haben sie rechtzeitig entdeckt und konnten die Siedlungen warnen. Der {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} stehe ihnen allen bei."

languages.text: "Zarkov'un koşucu mangaları onları zamanında tespit etmeyi başardı, böylece yerleşimlere uyarı verildi. {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g} hepsini korusun."
languages.original_text: "Zarkov's squads of runners managed to spot them in time, so the settlements were given warning, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} save them all."

traits.locale_text: "Zarkov'un koşucu mangaları onları zamanında tespit etmeyi başardı, böylece yerleşimlere uyarı verildi. {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g} hepsini korusun."

languages.text: « Des coureurs zarkoviens les ont repérés à temps et ont pu avertir la colonie. Que l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} les garde. »
languages.original_text: "Zarkov's squads of runners managed to spot them in time, so the settlements were given warning, {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} save them all."

traits.locale_text: « Des coureurs zarkoviens les ont repérés à temps et ont pu avertir la colonie. Que l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} les garde. »
